raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "classifying a negative spiritual condition of the soul",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "souls possess directed desires and aversions that can intend harm",
    "anger exemplifies a soul-state oriented toward prejudice or injury",
    "such soul-states constitute a distinct category separable from neutral or benevolent ones"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a framework that treats souls as entities with moral or affective orientations capable of harming others",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "a shared metaphysics in which souls are real agents whose inner states produce interpersonal effects, and the taxonomy aids ethical discernment or self-examination",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "absence of such soul-entities or causal links, so the claim reifies transient emotions as permanent metaphysical defects"
}
